violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cutting board noted not in good repair permanent staining noted in grooves indicating a need for replacement.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mop noted not hung.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded and/or end caps missing in dry food storage/3 compartment sink area.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Boxes of food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in freezer.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and floors in the sink area noted in need of cleaning (if it cannot be cleaned it should be repaired).
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded and/or end caps missing in dry food storage/3 compartment sink area.
